title: Glade Jar Candle, Scented Candle Infused with Essential Oils, Up to 42 Hour Burn Time, Cherry & Peony, Pack of 6 (6 x 129g)
features: This home fragrance is crafted with notes of juicy cherries and fresh pink peonies to inspire moments of shameless flirtation
Glade Luscious Peony and Cherry Jar Candle fragrance fills your room with long-lasting scent
Scented candles infused with essential oils
The candle's pretty glass container is designed to quickly fill the room with fragrance and warm light. Plus there's no need to worry about dripping wax!
Love, We have a fragrance for that
description: Product Description Awaken your senses with the Glade Jar Candle Luscious Peony and Cherry. Simply light the wick of these scented candles to quickly fill a room with fragrance infused with essential oils. Notes of rich cherry, red fruit, pink rose and peony meet to create the long-lasting scent of shameless flirtation. Directions Do not use if glass is chipped or cracked. Trim wick to 1/4 inch before each lighting. Keep candle free of matches and all material. Do not burn on cold, wet or unstable surface. Burn away from drafts. Never touch or move while lit, or until wax hardens. Never burn more than four hours. Stop use when 1/4 inch of wax remains. Do not extinguish with water. Do not reuse. Discard glass jar after use. Lead-free wick. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning candle unattended. Burn within sight. Extinguish before leaving the room or going to sleep. Do not burn for more than 4 hours at a time. Place on a heat-resistant surface. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Dispose of candle and container properly. Manufacturer Contact Information SCJ Ltd. Camberley GU16 7AJ See more
